drillName: Engine Failure After Take-off — After V1 [Airborne]
sourceNote: Full MCC callout drill from FCTM HBTS-001 ISS03 Section 5.4.1, Group 1 procedure. Exact PF/PM callout language. Memory items per POH/AFM Section 3.4.1 / QRH EN-4 to EN-5. AUTOFEATHER and NEGATIVE FEATHER branches included. All ▲ items requiresConfirmation=true.

memory.action: ENGINE FAILURE AFTER TAKE-OFF — AFTER V1
memory.reference: POH/AFM Section 3.4.1; QRH EN-4 to EN-5

memory.action: FIRE BELL (if applicable and installed) — MUTE
memory.reference: POH/AFM Section 3.4.1; QRH EN-4 to EN-5

memory.action: POWER AND PROP LEVERS (both engines) — MAX POWER
memory.reference: POH/AFM Section 3.4.1; QRH EN-4 to EN-5

flow.reference: POH/AFM Section 3.4.1; QRH EN-4 to EN-5

flow.action: MAX POWER, FLAP 10 SET — PROP LEVERS 96% NP both engines, FLAPS 10°, both propeller and power levers confirmed at max power setting
